---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-shell}
::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
::: {.hero-mark}
Minhyun Lee
:::

# Minhyun Lee

::: {.hero-tagline}
Research Staff at Samsung Electronics AI Center building practical machine learning systems for semiconductor data intelligence and layout pattern generation.
:::

I work on industrial computer vision and generative modeling under limited supervision. My recent focus is semiconductor-chip data, especially misalignment prediction, data preprocessing, and layout pattern generation with diffusion, vision-language, and reinforcement learning based methods.

::: {.hero-links}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&hl=ko){.btn-hero}
[GitHub](https://github.com/gaviotas){.btn-ghost}
[CV PDF](static/uploads/resume.pdf){.btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.hero-keywords}
`Semiconductor Data`
`Industrial Vision`
`Label-Efficient Learning`
`Layout Pattern Generation`
`Diffusion / VLM / RL`
`Dense Prediction`
:::

::: {.hero-metrics}
::: {.metric}
::: {.metric-value}
12
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Publications and patents
:::
:::

::: {.metric}
::: {.metric-value}
CVPR / ECCV / PAMI
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Representative venues
:::
:::

::: {.metric}
::: {.metric-value}
Samsung AI Center
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Current affiliation
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.hero-visual}
![](assets/profile/portrait.jpeg){.hero-photo}

::: {.hero-note}
::: {.hero-note-label}
Currently
:::

Research Staff  
Samsung Electronics AI Center
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
::: {.section-intro}
## About {#about}
A concise profile focused on current role, research direction, and academic background.
:::

::: {.about-grid}
::: {.about-copy}
I am a Research Staff member at Samsung Electronics AI Center. My work sits between industrial machine learning and computer vision, with an emphasis on systems that remain reliable when data is noisy, labels are limited, and deployment constraints are real.

Before joining Samsung Electronics, I completed my M.S. and Ph.D. in Integrated Technology at Yonsei University advised by Prof. Hyunjung Shim. Earlier work focused on weak supervision, semantic segmentation, localization, and representation learning; current work extends that foundation into semiconductor data intelligence and layout pattern generation.
:::

::: {.about-facts}
### Current Focus

- Misalignment prediction for semiconductor-chip data
- Label-efficient preprocessing and robust industrial learning
- Layout pattern generation and benchmarking
- Diffusion, VLM, and RL-based generation pipelines

### Background

- Research Staff, Samsung Electronics AI Center
- Former Research Staff, Samsung Electronics SAIT
- Ph.D., Yonsei University
- Research Internship, NAVER Cloud
:::
:::

::: {.section-intro}
## Recent Highlights
Recent work, transitions, and representative milestones.
:::

::: {.highlight-list}
::: {.highlight-item}
::: {.highlight-date}
2025
:::

Accepted `MaskRIS` to TMLR and `Fine-Grained Image-Text Correspondence with Cost Aggregation` to CVPR.
:::

::: {.highlight-item}
::: {.highlight-date}
2024
:::

Published `SeiT++` at ECCV and joined Samsung Electronics after completing the Ph.D. at Yonsei University.
:::

::: {.highlight-item}
::: {.highlight-date}
2023
:::

Completed research internship at NAVER Cloud on storage-efficient vision training and industrial-scale model development.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band .content-band-strong}
::: {.section-intro}
## Research {#research}
Current industrial interests and the academic themes that shaped them.
:::

::: {.interest-grid}
::: {.interest-column}
### Current

::: {.interest-item}
#### Semiconductor Data Intelligence

Robust preprocessing, misalignment prediction, and data-centric modeling for semiconductor-chip data under practical industrial constraints.
:::

::: {.interest-item}
#### Layout Pattern Generation

Generation and evaluation of semiconductor layout patterns using diffusion, vision-language, and reinforcement-learning based approaches.
:::
:::

::: {.interest-column}
### Previous

::: {.interest-item}
#### Label-Efficient Visual Learning

Weak supervision, semi-supervised learning, and practical strategies for reducing annotation cost while preserving downstream utility.
:::

::: {.interest-item}
#### Segmentation and Localization

Dense prediction and object localization under limited supervision, with a focus on robust pseudo-supervision and scene understanding.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section-intro}
## Publications {#publications}
Full publication list organized in a compact editorial format. Links point to the public Google Scholar entries.
:::

::: {.publication-shell}
{{< include /_partials/_publications.qmd >}}
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
::: {.section-intro}
## Experience {#experience}
Research and engineering roles across industrial AI, academic computer vision, and applied software development.
:::

::: {.resume-list}
::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Dec. 2024 - Present
:::

### Research Staff

Samsung Electronics, AI Center

Semiconductor data intelligence, misalignment prediction, and layout pattern generation for industrial chip-design workflows.
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Oct. 2024 - Dec. 2024
:::

### Research Staff

Samsung Electronics, SAIT

Image generation research with an emphasis on practical model development.
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Jul. 2023 - Dec. 2023
:::

### Research Internship

NAVER Cloud

Storage-efficient vision training and industrial-scale model development.
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Mar. 2019 - Aug. 2024
:::

### Ph.D. Student

Yonsei University

Advisor: Prof. Hyunjung Shim  
Research in computer vision, deep learning, weak supervision, and representation learning.
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Jan. 2018 - Sep. 2018
:::

### Student Intern

Yonsei University

Built software for an online learning platform.
:::
:::

::: {.section-intro}
## Education {#education}
Formal training in integrated technology and computer science.
:::

::: {.resume-list}
::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Mar. 2019 - Aug. 2024
:::

### M.S. and Ph.D. in Integrated Technology

Yonsei University

Advisor: Prof. Hyunjung Shim  
Completed in Aug. 2024.
:::

::: {.resume-item}
::: {.resume-kicker}
Mar. 2012 - Feb. 2019
:::

### B.S. in Computer Science

Yonsei University

Graduated 2nd of 79.
:::
:::

::: {.section-intro}
## Contact
The best way to reach me is by email or through the academic profiles below.
:::

::: {.contact-strip}
[Email](mailto:minhyunlee.ai@gmail.com){.contact-link}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&hl=ko){.contact-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/gaviotas){.contact-link}
[CV PDF](static/uploads/resume.pdf){.contact-link}
:::
:::
